caption: A man wearing a large, grey, cone-shaped wig, glasses, a white dress shirt, and a red bowtie is seated in a podcast studio. He wears black headphones and sits before a professional microphone. The background features a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and some clothing items hanging on racks. On-screen logos appearing in each frame include "THE TALKBOX PODCAST" on the left and "GOSS TALK JOY" on the right. Across the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, speaking and gesturing slightly with his head and facial expressions. His mouth moves as he talks, and his posture shifts subtly while he maintains his focus forward. The camera remains stationary, capturing him from the waist up in a medium shot throughout the clip.
